parameters.pythonCode:
from datetime import datetime, timezone
import pandas as pd

# --- Receive rows from Data Tables node ---
rows = [item['json'] for item in _items]
df = pd.DataFrame(rows)

# --- Parse and clean ---
df["start_time"] = pd.to_datetime(df["start_time"], utc=True)
df["end_time"] = pd.to_datetime(df["end_time"], utc=True)
df["duration_seconds"] = pd.to_numeric(df["duration_seconds"], errors="coerce").fillna(0)
df["is_idle"] = df["is_idle"].astype(bool)
df["category"] = df["category"].fillna("Uncategorized")

# --- Split active vs idle ---
df_active = df[df["is_idle"] == False].copy()
df_idle = df[df["is_idle"] == True].copy()

total_active = int(df_active["duration_seconds"].sum())
total_idle = int(df_idle["duration_seconds"].sum())

# --- 1. Time per category ---
by_category = (
    df_active.groupby("category")["duration_seconds"]
    .sum()
    .sort_values(ascending=False)
    .astype(int)
    .to_dict()
)

# --- 2. Daily activity ---
df_active["day"] = df_active["start_time"].dt.strftime("%a %d.%m")
by_day = (
    df_active.groupby("day")["duration_seconds"]
    .sum()
    .astype(int)
    .to_dict()
)

# --- 3. Top 10 apps + Others (for pie chart) ---
app_totals = (
    df_active.groupby("window_title")["duration_seconds"]
    .sum()
    .sort_values(ascending=False)
)
top_10 = app_totals.head(10).astype(int).to_dict()
others_sum = int(app_totals.iloc[10:].sum())
if others_sum > 0:
    top_10["Others"] = others_sum
top_apps_pie = top_10

# --- 4. Heatmap: weekday vs hour ---
df_active["hour"] = df_active["start_time"].dt.hour
df_active["weekday"] = df_active["start_time"].dt.strftime("%a")
heatmap = (
    df_active.groupby(["weekday", "hour"])["duration_seconds"]
    .sum()
    .reset_index()
    .rename(columns={"duration_seconds": "seconds"})
    .astype({"seconds": int})
    .to_dict(orient="records")
)

# --- 5. Stacked bar: category time per day ---
WEEKDAY_ORDER = ["Mon", "Tue", "Wed", "Thu", "Fri", "Sat", "Sun"]
df_active["weekday_short"] = df_active["start_time"].dt.strftime("%a")
stacked = (
    df_active.groupby(["weekday_short", "category"])["duration_seconds"]
    .sum()
    .reset_index()
)
# Build dict: {category: {day: hours}}
all_categories = stacked["category"].unique().tolist()
stacked_by_category = {}
for cat in all_categories:
    cat_df = stacked[stacked["category"] == cat]
    day_dict = dict(zip(cat_df["weekday_short"], cat_df["duration_seconds"] / 3600))
    stacked_by_category[cat] = {
        day: round(day_dict.get(day, 0.0), 2)
        for day in WEEKDAY_ORDER
    }

return [{
    "json": {
        "total_active_seconds": total_active,
        "total_idle_seconds": total_idle,
        "by_category": by_category,
        "by_day": by_day,
        "top_apps_pie": top_apps_pie,
        "stacked_by_category": stacked_by_category,
        "heatmap": heatmap,
        "weekday_order": WEEKDAY_ORDER,
        "all_categories": all_categories,
    }
}]

data = _items[0]['json'] def seconds_to_hm(s): h = int(s // 3600) m = int((s % 3600) // 60) return f"{h}h {m}m" total_active = seconds_to_hm(data['total_active_seconds']) total_idle = seconds_to_hm(data['total_idle_seconds']) category_rows = "" for cat, secs in data['by_category'].items(): category_rows += f"{cat}{seconds_to_hm(secs)}" html = f"""

Dev Activity Report

Weekly summary — last 7 days

{total_active}
Active Time
{total_idle}
Idle Time
{len(data['by_category'])}
Categories

Time per Category

{category_rows}

Category Breakdown

Daily Activity

Category per Day

Top Apps

Active vs Idle

Productivity Heatmap

Generated by Dev-Tracker · Privacy-first activity monitoring
""" return [{'json': {'subject': 'Dev Activity — Weekly Report', 'html': html}}]

parameters.pythonCode:
from datetime import datetime, timezone
import pandas as pd

rows = [item['json'] for item in _items]
df = pd.DataFrame(rows)

# --- Parse and clean ---
df["start_time"] = pd.to_datetime(df["start_time"], utc=True)
df["end_time"] = pd.to_datetime(df["end_time"], utc=True)
df["duration_seconds"] = pd.to_numeric(df["duration_seconds"], errors="coerce").fillna(0)
df["is_idle"] = df["is_idle"].astype(bool)
df["category"] = df["category"].fillna("Uncategorized")

df_active = df[df["is_idle"] == False].copy()
df_idle = df[df["is_idle"] == True].copy()

total_active = int(df_active["duration_seconds"].sum())
total_idle = int(df_idle["duration_seconds"].sum())

# --- 1. Time per category ---
by_category = (
    df_active.groupby("category")["duration_seconds"]
    .sum()
    .sort_values(ascending=False)
    .astype(int)
    .to_dict()
)

# --- 2. Top 10 apps + Others ---
app_totals = (
    df_active.groupby("window_title")["duration_seconds"]
    .sum()
    .sort_values(ascending=False)
)
top_10 = app_totals.head(10).astype(int).to_dict()
others_sum = int(app_totals.iloc[10:].sum())
if others_sum > 0:
    top_10["Others"] = others_sum
top_apps_pie = top_10

# --- 3. Weekly breakdown ---
df_active["week"] = df_active["start_time"].dt.isocalendar().week.astype(int)
df_active["week_label"] = df_active["start_time"].dt.strftime("W%V %d.%m")
# Group by week number, use first date as label
week_labels = (
    df_active.groupby("week")["week_label"]
    .first()
    .to_dict()
)
weekly_totals = (
    df_active.groupby("week")["duration_seconds"]
    .sum()
    .astype(int)
    .to_dict()
)
weekly_breakdown = {
    week_labels[w]: round(weekly_totals[w] / 3600, 2)
    for w in sorted(week_labels.keys())
}

# --- 4. Best day of week ---
WEEKDAY_ORDER = ["Mon", "Tue", "Wed", "Thu", "Fri", "Sat", "Sun"]
df_active["weekday"] = df_active["start_time"].dt.strftime("%a")
best_day = (
    df_active.groupby("weekday")["duration_seconds"]
    .sum()
    .reindex(WEEKDAY_ORDER, fill_value=0)
    .astype(int)
    .to_dict()
)

# --- 5. Hour of day distribution ---
df_active["hour"] = df_active["start_time"].dt.hour
hour_dist = (
    df_active.groupby("hour")["duration_seconds"]
    .sum()
    .reindex(range(24), fill_value=0)
    .astype(int)
    .to_dict()
)
hour_dist = {str(k): v for k, v in hour_dist.items()}

# --- 6. Daily calendar heatmap ---
df_active["day"] = df_active["start_time"].dt.strftime("%Y-%m-%d")
daily_totals = (
    df_active.groupby("day")["duration_seconds"]
    .sum()
    .astype(int)
    .to_dict()
)

return [{
    "json": {
        "total_active_seconds": total_active,
        "total_idle_seconds": total_idle,
        "by_category": by_category,
        "top_apps_pie": top_apps_pie,
        "weekly_breakdown": weekly_breakdown,
        "best_day": best_day,
        "hour_dist": hour_dist,
        "daily_totals": daily_totals,
        "weekday_order": WEEKDAY_ORDER,
    }
}]

data = _items[0]['json'] def seconds_to_hm(s): h = int(s // 3600) m = int((s % 3600) // 60) return f"{h}h {m}m" total_active = seconds_to_hm(data['total_active_seconds']) total_idle = seconds_to_hm(data['total_idle_seconds']) category_rows = "" for cat, secs in data['by_category'].items(): category_rows += f"{cat}{seconds_to_hm(secs)}" html = f"""

Dev Activity — Monthly Report

Full month summary

{total_active}
Active Time
{total_idle}
Idle Time
{len(data['by_category'])}
Categories

Time per Category

{category_rows}

Category Breakdown

Weekly Breakdown

Best Day of Week

Peak Hours

Top Apps

Active vs Idle

Daily Activity Calendar

Generated by Dev-Tracker · Privacy-first activity monitoring
""" return [{'json': {'subject': 'Dev Activity — Monthly Report', 'html': html}}]
